summary: Delta Zonal V2 backend testing complete. 15/16 tests passed. All new N2/N3 features verified: interaction_quality, dz_vah/val/vwap/poc with zscore/delta_ratio/volume_significant/signal, dz_summary_status, dz_avg_delta_ratio, N3 absorption_price_limit (elastic ATR-based), Welford persistence to MongoDB, snapshot recording with dz_n2/dz_n3 data.

minor.issue: First request timeout (30s) - transient cold start, subsequent requests work fine (343ms)

passed_tests: ✅ nivel_2 contains interaction_quality field with valid values
✅ nivel_2 contains dz_vah, dz_val, dz_vwap, dz_poc with zscore, delta_ratio, volume_significant, signal
✅ nivel_2 contains dz_summary_status and dz_avg_delta_ratio fields
✅ nivel_3.delta_zonal.levels contain delta_ratio and volume_baseline fields
✅ MES nivel_2 has same new fields as MNQ (cross-symbol validation)
✅ MES nivel_3 has same new fields as MNQ
✅ Welford Z-Score computed and persisted (7 accumulators in MongoDB)
✅ N2 reason string contains DZ metrics (Z, Ratio)
✅ N3 absorption_limit uses ATR-based elastic formula (0.25 x ATR_M1)
critical_code_review_comments: Z-Scores are 0.0 for some levels - this is EXPECTED per agent context (Welford needs n>=3 crossings)
Welford warm-start from MongoDB is working (7 accumulators loaded)
Snapshot service correctly stores dz_n2 and dz_n3 data
evaluate_filters correctly consumes DZ N2 data per regime (verified via reason string)

test_credentials.note: Auth not required for V3 signal endpoints (public API)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delta Zonal V2 refactoring fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/v3/signal/{symbol} returns nivel_2 with interaction_quality, dz_vah/val/vwap/poc objects, dz_summary_status, dz_avg_delta_ratio. nivel_3.delta_zonal has absorption_price_limit (elastic ATR-based). Welford accumulators persist to MongoDB collection 'welford_stats' and warm-start on restart. Snapshots store dz_n2/dz_n3 data. Z-Scores may be 0.0 if Welford n<3 (cold start behavior).

feature_verification.interaction_quality_field: Working - returns valid values per regime
feature_verification.dz_levels_in_n2: Working - dz_vah, dz_val, dz_vwap, dz_poc with all required subfields
feature_verification.n3_levels_delta_ratio: Working - delta_ratio and volume_baseline in all N3 levels
feature_verification.cross_symbol_validation: Working - MES has same fields as MNQ
feature_verification.welford_persistence: Working - 7 accumulators in MongoDB welford_stats collection
feature_verification.evaluate_filters_per_regime: Working - reason string shows DZ metrics (Z, Ratio)

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints use real DataBento data and MongoDB.
